sections.text: Vikenco's vision is "Quality from the sea"

sections.title: About the company
items: 🐟 Salmon and trout slaughtering, processing and sales
📍 Located on Rindarøya, Aukra, Møre og Romsdal, Norway
🏭 One of the world's most modern salmon processing facilities
👥 341 employees (2024) from Norway, Lithuania, Ukraine, Romania and more
🌍 Products sold to Norway, USA, Asia and Europe
💰 SalMar is the majority owner (51%)

sections.text: Vikenco's business idea is to produce fish with the lowest possible footprint, at the best possible quality and price.

animatedSteps.description: Founded as a seafood company in Aukra, Møre og Romsdal
Start of massive investment program (~1 billion NOK)
New state-of-the-art slaughterhouse completed (120,000 tonnes/year, 120 fish/minute)

gridItems.label: 95% of raw materials to human consumption

sections.title: Our values
items: 🎯 Quality and food safety above all
🌍 Lowest possible environmental footprint
🤝 Motivated and skilled workforce
📈 At the forefront of technological development
♻️ 95% raw material utilization for human consumption

sections.title: Community engagement
items: ⚽ Gold partner of Molde FK (football club)
👶 Supporting children's sports and culture
🏘️ 1.5 million NOK annually to local community

sections.text: We believe in creating value not just through production, but by giving back to the community where we live and work.

sections.title: About the workforce
items: 🌍 Multicultural workplace: employees from Norway, Lithuania, Ukraine, Romania and more
⚖️ Equal treatment regardless of gender, language, origin or life situation
📋 Collective agreements ensure predictability and equal pay
🏥 Sick leave rate 7.33% in 2024 (decreasing)
🛡️ Focus on preventing musculoskeletal disorders

sections.text: At Vikenco, all employees are treated equally, regardless of gender, language, origin or life situation.
Quote from CEO Per Olav Mevold: "We are the sum of our employees and partners."

sections.title: Key messages from the CEO
items: 📈 2024 was a record year with growth and efficiency
🏗️ Building phase 2 at Rindarøya completed
🌱 Sustainability is our compass
🤝 350 employees delivering their best every day
🌍 Ready to face a complex world without losing competitiveness
